Container.Name: NewspaSync
Container.Overview: Self-hosted daily newspaper generator for reMarkable tablets. Generates a PDF newspaper from weather, RSS news, tasks (TickTick), Wikipedia, Wikiquote, Word of the Day, learning curricula, shell snippets, and more. Delivers to your reMarkable on a schedule, or sends by email. Web UI at port 3050 for configuration, manual runs, and PDF preview.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: NewspaSync web interface — dashboard, settings, PDF preview

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Configuration files: RSS sources, editions, appearance, learning curricula

Config.Name: Output (PDFs)
Config.Description: Generated PDF newspapers

Config.Name: reMarkable Auth Token
Config.Description: reMarkable authentication token — run auth once then this persists across restarts

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your local timezone. Examples: America/New_York, Europe/London, Australia/Sydney, Asia/Tokyo

Config.Name: Schedule Time
Config.Description: Daily time to generate the newspaper (HH:MM, 24-hour format). Change this in the web UI without restarting.

Config.Name: Run On Start
Config.Description: Generate a newspaper immediately when the container starts (true/false)

Config.Name: Web UI Enabled
Config.Description: Enable the web interface (true/false). Keep true unless running headless.

Config.Name: reMarkable Sync Method
Config.Description: How to deliver to reMarkable: rmapi (USB/WiFi sync, recommended) or email (requires REMARKABLE_DEVICE_EMAIL)

Config.Name: reMarkable Folder
Config.Description: Folder on reMarkable where newspapers are saved

Config.Name: reMarkable Archive Folder
Config.Description: Folder on reMarkable for archived (older) newspapers

Config.Name: reMarkable Archive Keep Days
Config.Description: Number of days to keep archived newspapers before deleting from reMarkable

Config.Name: reMarkable Device Email
Config.Description: Your @mail.remarkable.com address. Only needed if REMARKABLE_SYNC_METHOD=email.

Config.Name: Weather Enabled
Config.Description: Show a weather forecast in the newspaper (true/false)

Config.Name: Weather Latitude
Config.Description: Your location latitude for weather (e.g. 40.7128). Find at latlong.net.

Config.Name: Weather Longitude
Config.Description: Your location longitude for weather (e.g. -74.0060). Find at latlong.net.

Config.Name: Weather Location Name
Config.Description: Display name shown in the newspaper for your location (e.g. New York)

Config.Name: Weather Units
Config.Description: Temperature units: celsius or fahrenheit

Config.Name: SMTP Host
Config.Description: SMTP server for outbound email (e.g. smtp.gmail.com). Used by both reMarkable email delivery and PDF email copy.

Config.Name: SMTP Port
Config.Description: SMTP server port. 587 for STARTTLS (recommended), 465 for SSL.

Config.Name: SMTP Username
Config.Description: SMTP login username / from address (usually your email address)

Config.Name: SMTP Password
Config.Description: SMTP password or app-specific password. For Gmail: create an App Password at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords.

Config.Name: PDF Email Enabled
Config.Description: Send the generated PDF to an email inbox after each run (true/false). Requires SMTP credentials above.

Config.Name: PDF Email Recipient
Config.Description: Email address(es) to send the newspaper PDF to. Separate multiple addresses with commas.

Config.Name: Email Inbox Enabled
Config.Description: Show your email inbox summary in the newspaper (true/false)

Config.Name: Email IMAP Host
Config.Description: IMAP server hostname for reading inbox emails

Config.Name: Email IMAP Port
Config.Description: IMAP server port (993 for SSL)

Config.Name: Email Username
Config.Description: Email address for IMAP login

Config.Name: Email Password
Config.Description: Email password or app-specific password for IMAP access

Config.Name: Email Max Items
Config.Description: Maximum number of emails to include in the newspaper

Config.Name: TickTick Enabled
Config.Description: Show TickTick tasks in the newspaper (true/false). Requires Client ID and Secret below.

Config.Name: TickTick Client ID
Config.Description: TickTick OAuth Client ID. Create an app at developer.ticktick.com.

Config.Name: TickTick Client Secret
Config.Description: TickTick OAuth Client Secret

Config.Name: TickTick Show Overdue
Config.Description: Include overdue tasks alongside today's tasks (true/false)

Config.Name: AI Summaries Enabled
Config.Description: Generate AI summaries for news articles (true/false). Requires AI API Key below.

Config.Name: AI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key, or key for a compatible API (Groq, Together, etc.)

Config.Name: AI API Base URL
Config.Description: API base URL. Change for local models: http://your-ollama-ip:11434/v1

Config.Name: AI Model
Config.Description: Model name to use for article summaries (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, llama3, mistral)

Config.Name: RSS Enabled
Config.Description: Include RSS news feeds in the newspaper (true/false). Configure feeds in the web UI.

Config.Name: RSS Max Articles Per Feed
Config.Description: Maximum number of articles to include per RSS feed

Config.Name: Sudoku Enabled
Config.Description: Include a Sudoku puzzle in the newspaper (true/false)

Config.Name: Sudoku Difficulty
Config.Description: Sudoku difficulty: easy, medium, or hard
